workflow.name: Send cold outreach emails and follow-ups with Resend, Postgres and HubSpot
workflow.description:
Automate your cold email outreach with this 3-stage workflow that sends emails, triggers follow-ups after 3 days, and syncs responses to HubSpot CRM automatically.

- **Uses:** n8n, Postgres/Supabase, Resend API, HubSpot

- **Features:** Scheduled triggers, automatic follow-ups, response tracking via webhooks, CRM auto-sync

Perfect for sales teams and marketers who want to scale outreach without manual work.

**📺 Full tutorial included**

**📧 Questions?** Need customization? Connect with me on LinkedIn: [Click here](https://www.linkedin.com/in/gilbert-onyebuchi/)

👀 Check out my other automation workflows on my n8n creator profile for more productivity tools!

parameters.content: ## 2. Filter by last day contacted, send follow-up, then update
## 3. Listen to email and stop when user reply. Then append to Hubspot

## Stop Manual Follow-ups with Automated Email Outreach Pipeline using n8n, Postgres and Resend

## Watch my tutorial 
@[youtube](ZmN8jMhNJS4)

## How it works
- **The schedule Trigger nodes** are used to trigger the workflow
- **Postgres nodes** are for making request calls to your postgres database
- **Loop over items nodes** are to run data in sync repeatedly until the data finishes
- **Wait nodes** are to run delay the workflow
- **The HTTP request nodes** to make API call to [Resend](https://resend.com/) to send email
- **Filter node** to filter data
- **Webhook** to return data from [Resend](https://resend.com/) when email is received
- **Hubspot node** to append data to your [HubSpot](https://www.hubspot.com/) CRM contact

## Setup
1. Register on [Supabase](https://supabase.com/) and create a table with data. Click connect above the supabase UI and set Method to transaction pooler. Connect the credential in Postgres node in n8n. Watch the tutorial video to understand better
2. Register on [Resend](https://resend.com/). Link your Domain and verify. Connect API credential to HTTP request node
3. Add Webhook in [Resend](https://resend.com/)
4. Register on [HubSpot](https://www.hubspot.com/), create a legacy APP and connect credential to HubSpot node

user.name: Gilbert Onyebuchi

data.details: The Filter node can be used to filter items based on a condition. If the condition is met, the item will be passed on to the next node. If the condition is not met, the item will be omitted. Conditions can be combined together by AND(meet all conditions), or OR(meet at least one condition).
